traditions.name: Hermetic
traditions.origin: Hermes Trismegistus — Greco-Egyptian synthesis, Corpus Hermeticum (~2nd century CE)

patterns.insight: Jupiter-Saturn Air Era (2020-2219): shift from material to informational economies. Technology cycles mirror celestial concentration patterns. The Barbault minimum of 2020 marks the turning point — dispersal now favors distributed/decentralized systems.

Planetary dispersal after 2020 minimum suggests reconstruction phase. Saturn-Neptune conjunction (2026) marks ideological restructuring — historically dissolves one paradigm and seeds the next. Previous: 1989 dissolved communism.

Celestial concentration historically correlates with market volatility. Current dispersal favors gradual recovery but 2026 conjunction tests resilience. Jupiter-Uranus conjunction (2024) in Taurus historically triggers commodity/currency paradigm shifts.

Uranus in Gemini (2025-2033) — the sign of communication and information. Last transit: 1941-1949, which birthed computing (ENIAC, information theory). Current transit: AI as communication revolution.
Jupiter-Saturn Air Era favors dematerialized value. Saturn-Uranus square (2021-2022) stress-tested crypto; surviving protocols gain Saturn-validation. Next test: Saturn-Neptune (2026).

traditions.name: Ibn Khaldun
traditions.principle: Asabiyyah cycle — social cohesion rises and decays over ~4 generations
traditions.origin: Ibn Khaldun — Muqaddimah (1377 CE), Tunis. Founder of social science, historiography

patterns.insight: Late-cycle luxury pattern: credential inflation in tech mirrors dynastic 4th-generation decay. Renewal emerges from peripheral innovators with high asabiyyah (startups, open-source communities, non-Western tech ecosystems).

Western institutions at ~250 years from founding (1776). Classic Khaldunian transition: old elite fragments, new cohesive group emerges from periphery. Question is whether transition is internal renewal or external replacement.

Fiscal overextension (Debt/GDP 123%) matches late-dynastic pattern. Historical resolution: currency debasement or institutional reset. Khaldun noted that tax increases in late dynasty accelerate decline rather than resolve it.

AI as 'new periphery' — high asabiyyah in AI research communities mirrors the cohesive groups that historically replace fragmented elites. The question: will AI serve the old dynasty or catalyze the new?
Decentralized finance as peripheral challenge to central banking — a classic Khaldunian dynamic. But crypto communities themselves show luxury-phase decay (speculation over utility).

traditions.name: Vedic
traditions.principle: Yuga cycle — consciousness expansion/contraction over cosmic timescales
traditions.origin: Sri Yukteswar — The Holy Science (1894), calibrating Vedic yuga astronomy. Based on Manu Smriti + Surya Siddhanta

patterns.insight: Ascending Dwapara Yuga (energy/awareness age, began ~1700 CE): AI emergence maps to expected consciousness-technology coupling. Electricity, atomic energy, now artificial intelligence — progressive mastery of subtler forces.
Transitional friction between ascending yugas is expected. Current disruption = birth pains of expanding awareness, not terminal decline. Dwapara yuga favors decentralized governance over empire.
Dwapara economy favors energy and information over material accumulation. Crypto/digital assets align with yuga characteristics — value as energy pattern rather than physical substance.

Dwapara consciousness perceives energy directly. AI as externalized cognition aligns with yuga trajectory — humanity creating thinking systems as it develops capacity to perceive non-material reality.
Money evolving from matter (gold) to energy (electricity-backed crypto) matches Dwapara progression. Store of value becomes store of energy.

traditions.name: Chinese
traditions.principle: Jiazi 60-year cycle — Heavenly Stems × Earthly Branches
traditions.origin: Chinese cosmological tradition — Shang Dynasty oracle bones (~1200 BCE). Integrated into Yi Jing, feng shui, TCM

patterns.insight: 60-year Jiazi renewal (2024-2084): historically correlates with new governance models and institutional forms. AI governance = expected pattern. Wood Dragon year (2024) specifically associated with ambitious new beginnings.
Previous Jiazi (1964): Cultural Revolution + global upheaval. Before that (1904): Qing Dynasty collapse, Russo-Japanese War. Pattern: old forms collapse, new crystallize within 20 years.

Jiazi renewal phases historically restructure economic paradigms. First 20 years favor innovation and new entrants over incumbents. Dragon/Snake years (2024-2025) historically volatile but foundational.

New Jiazi cycle (2024) arrives with AI transition. Previous cycles brought electricity (1904) and computing/internet (1964). Pattern: each Jiazi inaugurates a new relationship between humanity and a fundamental force.
60-year financial infrastructure cycles: 1904 (Federal Reserve founding era), 1964 (Bretton Woods stress), 2024 (Bitcoin ETF, CBDC competition). Each Jiazi restructures what counts as money.
